svg.text: VOICE LIVE API — Unified Speech-to-Speech (single WebSocket endpoint)
GPT MODELS — Used inside Voice Live (STT via Azure Speech + TTS output)
MICROSOFT PHI MODELS — Lite tier (edge / low-cost deployments)
AZURE SPEECH STT MODELS — Input transcription layer
GPT-5, GPT-4.1, GPT-4o, gpt-realtime — highest quality
Phi models, GPT-4.1-Nano — lowest cost / edge devices
